title: Shared-Lives
description: Small plugin for Minecraft that makes players damage shared between them.
body:
🎉 Shared-Lives 🎉

Small plugin for Minecraft that makes players damage shared between them.
What is Shared-Lives?

Ever wanted your Minecraft team to truly share everything—including their pain? With Shared-Lives, whenever one player takes damage, everyone in the group feels it! Want to make things even more chaotic? This plugin is for you!
Features

    🩸 Shared Damage: All pain is mutual!
    🛠️ Easy to set up—just drop it in your plugins folder.
    👫 Play with friends and test your teamwork (or suffer together).

Installation

    Download the plugin.
    Drop it into your server's plugins folder.
    Restart your server.
    Configure below!

Configuration

All settings are in plugins/Shared-Lives/config.yml.
YAML

share-heal: false

🔧 Options

    share-heal:
        true: Healing one player heals everyone!
        false: Only damage is shared, healing is not.

    Default: false

Example

Want everyone to heal together?
Set share-heal: true
YAML

share-heal: true

How Does It Work?

    Take damage? The whole squad takes damage!
    Eat some food? If share-heal is enabled, everyone gets a boost.

Why Use Shared-Lives?

    Make your adventures thrilling, challenging, and hilarious.
    Perfect for custom game modes, streamers, or anyone who loves chaos.
